procedure.name: GetOrgItemHierarchy
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION GetOrgItemHierarchy ( @StartItemId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( --построение дерева оргструктуры по иерархии вверх with Rec as ( select oi.id, oi.parentitem, 0 as lvl from organizationitem oi where oi.IsDeleted=0 and oi.id = @StartItemId union all select oit.id, oit.parentitem, Rec.lvl + 1 as lvl from organizationitem oit inner join Rec on Rec.ParentItem = oit.id and oit.IsDeleted=0 ) select Rec.Id as OrgItemId, Rec.lvl as Lvl, us.UserId from Rec left join UserSecuritySetCache us on rec.Id = us.OrgItemId where Rec.Id != @StartItemId and us.usercount != -1 and us.orgitemid is not null )

procedure.name: GetOrgItemChilds
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION GetOrgItemChilds ( @StartItemId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( --построение дерева оргструктуры по иерархии вниз with Rec as ( select oi.id, oi.parentitem, 0 as lvl from organizationitem oi where oi.IsDeleted=0 and oi.id = @StartItemId union all select oit.id, oit.parentitem, Rec.lvl + 1 as lvl from organizationitem oit inner join Rec on Rec.Id = oit.parentitem and oit.IsDeleted=0 ) select Rec.Id as OrgItemId, Rec.lvl as Lvl from Rec )

procedure.name: GetUserChiefsHierarchy
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION GetUserChiefsHierarchy ( @StartUserId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( --получить начальников пользователя в порядке иерархии select us.OrgItemId as StartItemId, oih.* from UserSecuritySetCache us cross apply GetOrgItemHierarchy(us.OrgItemId) oih left join &&OrganizationItem&& oi on oi.&&Id&& = us.&&OrgItemId&& left join &&OrganizationItem&& oi1 on oi1.&&Id&& = oih.&&OrgItemId&& where us.userid = @StartUserId and us.usercount != -1 and us.orgitemid is not null and oi.&&ItemType&& in (1,2) and oi1.&&ItemType&& in (1) )

procedure.name: OrgStructTree

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select Id, ItemType, Name, ISNULL(ParentItem, 0) AS ParentItemId, Uid from ORGSTRUCTTREE()

procedure.text: create function ORGSTRUCTTREE() returns TABLE as return ( select oi.id, oi.itemtype, oi.name, oi.parentitem, oi.uid from organizationitem oi where oi.IsDeleted=0 )

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select UserId from UserSecuritySetCache where GroupId in (:groupId) union select oid.UserId from OrganizationItem oid where oid.UserId is not null and oid.Id in (:orgItemId) union select oiu.UserId from OrganizationItem oi inner join OrganizationItemUsers oiu on oiu.OrganizationItemId=oi.Id where oiu.UserId is not null and oi.Id in (:orgItemId)

procedure.name: FillUserSecuritySetCacheTest
procedure.text:
CREATE PROCEDURE FillUserSecuritySetCacheTest AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
declare @typemask bigint, @usermask bigint, @groupmask bigint, @organizationitemmask bigint; -- маска которая оставляет только биты типа set @typemask = 9151314442816847872; -- 1111111[0]55 -- маска начальников пользователя set @usermask = 72057594037927936; -- побитовый сдвиг влево 1 на 56 разрядов (2 ^ 56) 1[0]55 -- маска группы set @groupmask = 144115188075855872; -- побитовый сдвиг влево 10 на 56 разрядов (2 ^ 56) 10[0]55 -- маска отдела set @organizationitemmask = 216172782113783808; -- побитовый сдвиг влево 11 на 56 разрядов (2 ^ 56) 11[0]55
-- начальники пользователей -- удаляем из кеша старые записи delete from UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp
insert into UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp (SetId, UserId, SubordinateUserId, Subordinate) select SetId, UserId, SubordinateUserId, min(Subordinate) as Subordinate from ( select (u.Id | @usermask) as SetId, u.Id as UserId, u.Id as SubordinateUserId, 0 as Subordinate from [User] u union select (s.UserId | @usermask), u.Id, s.UserId, 1 from [user] u cross apply [GetUserSubordinate](u.Id) s ) s group by SetId, UserId, SubordinateUserId
-- группы
;with GroupUsers as (select ug.Id, gs.UserId as UserId, 0 as Subordinate from [UserGroup] ug cross apply [GetGroupUsers](ug.Id) gs) insert into UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp (SetId, UserId, GroupId, Subordinate) select (s.Id|@groupmask), s.UserId, case when Min(s.Subordinate)=0 then s.Id end, Min(s.Subordinate) as Subordinate from (select * from GroupUsers union select gu.Id, ussc.UserId, 1 from GroupUsers gu inner join UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp ussc on ussc.SubordinateUserId = gu.UserId ) s group by s.Id, s.UserId
-- подразделения
;with DepartmentUsers (Id, UserId, Subordinate) as ( select oi.Id, s.UserId, 0 as Subordinate from [OrganizationItem] oi cross apply [GetDepartmentUsers](oi.Id) s ) insert into UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp (SetId, UserId, Subordinate) select (s.Id|@organizationitemmask), s.UserId, Min(s.Subordinate) from (select * from DepartmentUsers union select gu.Id, ussc.UserId, 1 from DepartmentUsers gu inner join UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp ussc on ussc.SubordinateUserId = gu.UserId ) s group by Id, UserId
delete from UserSecuritySetCacheTest where not exists(select SetId from UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp t where t.SetId=UserSecuritySetCacheTest.SetId and t.UserId=UserSecuritySetCacheTest.UserId and t.SubordinateUserId=UserSecuritySetCacheTest.SubordinateUserId and t.Subordinate=UserSecuritySetCacheTest.Subordinate and t.GroupId=UserSecuritySetCacheTest.GroupId); insert into UserSecuritySetCacheTest (SetId, UserId, SubordinateUserId, Subordinate,GroupId) select t.SetId, t.UserId, t.SubordinateUserId, t.Subordinate, t.GroupId from UserSecuritySetCacheTestTemp t left join UserSecuritySetCacheTest c on t.SetId=c.SetId and t.UserId=c.UserId and t.SubordinateUserId=c.SubordinateUserId and t.Subordinate=c.Subordinate and t.GroupId=c.GroupId where c.SetId is null;
END

procedure.name: GetDepartmentUsers
procedure.text:
-- список пользователей для элемента оргструктуры CREATE FUNCTION [GetDepartmentUsers] ( @DepartmentId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN (
-- для отдела все поддерево, для должности и группы только сам элемент WITH AllOrganizationItems(Id, UserId, ItemType) AS ( -- отделы где является непосредственным начальником select oi.Id, oi.[UserId], oi.ItemType from OrganizationItem oi with (nolock) where oi.Id = @DepartmentId UNION ALL -- подчиненные отделы select oi.Id, oi.[UserId], aoi.ItemType from OrganizationItem oi with (nolock) INNER JOIN AllOrganizationItems aoi ON oi.ParentItem = aoi.Id and aoi.ItemType=0 )
-- начальники всех отделов select aoi.[UserId] from AllOrganizationItems aoi where aoi.[UserId] is not null union select oim.[UserId] from AllOrganizationItems aoi INNER JOIN OrganizationItemUsers oim with (nolock) on oim.OrganizationItemId = aoi.Id )

procedure.name: GetOrganizationItemUsers
GetGroupUsers
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION [GetGroupUsers] ( @GroupId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( WITH AllGroups(GroupId) AS ( select g.Id as GroupId from UserGroup g with (nolock) where g.Id = @GroupId and g.Uid != '97D7E638-F957-4964-B991-2B1AEED59163' union all select gm.ChildId as GroupId from UserGroup_Groups_Map gm with (nolock) INNER JOIN AllGroups ag on ag.GroupId = gm.ParentId ) select distinct s.UserId from ( select ugm.UserId as UserId from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_User_Map ugm with (nolock) on ugm.GroupId = ag.GroupId union select du.UserId as UserId from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_OrgItem_Map oim with (nolock) on oim.GroupId = ag.GroupId cross apply GetOrganizationItemUsers(oim.OrgItemId) du union select u.Id from [User] u with (nolock) where u.[Status] = 0 and exists (select top 1 Id from UserGroup with (nolock) where Id = @GroupId and Uid = '97D7E638-F957-4964-B991-2B1AEED59163') )s )

procedure.name: GetGroupsForUsers
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION [GetGroupsForUsers] ( @UserId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( select GroupId from UserSecuritySetCache where UserId = @UserId and GroupId > 0 )

procedure.name: GetUserChief
procedure.text:
-- список начальников для порльзователя CREATE FUNCTION [GetUserChief] ( @UserId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( WITH AllOrganizationItems(Id) AS ( -- прямые начальники и отделы в кторых находится пользователль ( -- должности пользователя select oi.ParentItem as id from OrganizationItem oi where oi.[UserId] = @UserId and oi.ParentItem IS NOT NULL UNION -- отделы в которых состоит польователь (select poi.ParentItem as id from OrganizationItemUsers ioum INNER JOIN OrganizationItem poi on poi.Id = ioum.OrganizationItemId where ioum.UserId = @UserId and poi.ParentItem IS NOT NULL) ) UNION ALL -- начальники начальников и вышестоящие отделы select coi.Id from OrganizationItem oi INNER JOIN AllOrganizationItems aoi ON aoi.Id = oi.Id INNER JOIN OrganizationItem coi ON coi.Id = oi.ParentItem )
select oi.[UserId] from AllOrganizationItems aoi INNER JOIN OrganizationItem oi on aoi.Id = oi.Id where oi.[UserId] IS NOT NULL )

procedure.name: GetUserSubordinate
procedure.text:
-- список подчиненных для пользователя CREATE FUNCTION [GetUserSubordinate] ( @UserId bigint ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( -- отделы подчиненные пользователю WITH AllOrganizationItems(Id, UserId, flag) AS ( -- отделы где является непосредственным начальником select oi.Id, oi.UserId, 1 Flag from OrganizationItem oi with (nolock) where oi.UserId = @UserId UNION select oi.Id, oiu.UserId, 0 from OrganizationItem oi with (nolock) left join OrganizationItemUsers oiu with (nolock) on oiu.OrganizationItemId=oi.Id where oiu.UserId = @UserId UNION ALL -- подчиненные отделы select oi.Id, oi.UserId, 1 from OrganizationItem oi with (nolock) INNER JOIN AllOrganizationItems aoi ON oi.ParentItem = aoi.Id )
-- начальники всех отделов select aoi.[UserId] from AllOrganizationItems aoi where aoi.[UserId] != @UserId union select oim.[UserId] from AllOrganizationItems aoi INNER JOIN OrganizationItemUsers oim with (nolock) on oim.OrganizationItemId = aoi.Id and aoi.flag = 1 where oim.[UserId] != @UserId )

procedure.name: SplitString
procedure.text:
CREATE FUNCTION SplitString( @delimited NVARCHAR(MAX), @delimiter NVARCHAR(100) ) RETURNS @t TABLE (val NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS BEGIN DECLARE @xml XML SET @xml = N'<t>' + REPLACE(@delimited,@delimiter,'</t><t>') + '</t>'
INSERT INTO @t(val) SELECT r.value('.','varchar(MAX)') as item FROM @xml.nodes('/t') as records(r) RETURN END

procedure.name: GetOrgItemsChilds
procedure.text: CREATE FUNCTION GetOrgItemsChilds ( @StartItemIds NVARCHAR(MAX) ) RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( select ussc1.OrgItemId as OrgItemId from UserSecuritySetCache ussc inner join SplitString(@StartItemIds, ',') ss on cast(ss.val as bigint) = ussc.OrgItemId and ussc.UserCount > 0 inner join UserSecuritySetCache ussc1 on ussc1.UserId = ussc.UserId where ussc1.OrgItemId is not null group by ussc1.OrgItemId )

procedure.name: GetDepartments
procedure.text: -- список вхождений элементов оргструктуры в отделы CREATE FUNCTION GetDepartments() RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( -- для отделов все поддерево, для должностей и групп только сами элементы WITH AllOrganizationItems AS ( -- все элементы оргструктуры select oi.Id, oi.UserId, oi.ItemType, oi.Id DepartmentId from OrganizationItem oi with (nolock) UNION ALL -- подчиненные элементы оргструктуры для родительского отдела select oi.Id, oi.UserId, aoi.ItemType, aoi.DepartmentId from OrganizationItem oi with (nolock) INNER JOIN AllOrganizationItems aoi ON oi.ParentItem = aoi.Id and aoi.ItemType=0 ) select Id, UserId, DepartmentId from AllOrganizationItems )

procedure.name: GetDepartmentsUsers
procedure.text:
-- список пользователей для элементов оргструктуры CREATE FUNCTION GetDepartmentsUsers() RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( WITH AllOrganizationItems AS (select * from GetDepartments())
select Id, UserId, COUNT(*) UserCount from ( -- начальники отделов select aoi.DepartmentId Id, aoi.UserId, aoi.DepartmentId oiId from AllOrganizationItems aoi where aoi.UserId is not null union all -- сотрудники отделов select aoi.DepartmentId, oim.UserId, aoi.Id from AllOrganizationItems aoi INNER JOIN OrganizationItemUsers oim with (nolock) on oim.OrganizationItemId = aoi.Id )s group by Id, UserId )

procedure.name: GetGroups
procedure.text: -- список вхождения групп в группы CREATE FUNCTION GetGroups() RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( WITH AllGroups(ParentGroupId, ChildGroupId) AS ( select g.Id ParentGroupId, g.Id ChildGroupId from UserGroup g with (nolock) union all select gm.ChildId, ag.ChildGroupId from UserGroup_Groups_Map gm with (nolock) INNER JOIN AllGroups ag on ag.ParentGroupId = gm.ParentId ) select ParentGroupId, ChildGroupId from AllGroups )

procedure.name: GetGroupsUsers
procedure.text: -- список пользователей для группы (с количеством вхождений в группу) CREATE FUNCTION GetGroupsUsers() RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN ( WITH AllGroups AS (select * from GetGroups()) select GroupId, UserId, SUM(UserCount) UserCount from ( select ag.ParentGroupId gId, null oiId, ag.ChildGroupId as GroupId, ugm.UserId as UserId, 1 UserCount from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_User_Map ugm with (nolock) on ugm.GroupId = ag.ParentGroupId union select ag.ParentGroupId, oim.OrgItemId, ag.ChildGroupId, oi.UserId, oi.UserCount from AllGroups ag inner join UserGroup_OrgItem_Map oim with (nolock) on oim.GroupId = ag.ParentGroupId inner join UserSecuritySetCacheTemp oi with (nolock) on oim.OrgItemId = oi.OrgItemId and oi.Subordinate=0 )s group by GroupId, UserId )

procedure.name: FillUserSecuritySetCache
UpdateUserSecuritySetCache

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select u.UserId from GroupPermissions gp cross apply GetGroupUsers(gp.GroupId) u where PermissionId = :PermissionId

procedure.name: UpsertActiveUserSession
procedure.text:
CREATE PROCEDURE UpsertActiveUserSession ( @TicketUidParam [uniqueidentifier], @SessionIdParam [nvarchar](255), @StatusParam [int], @ExpirationParam [datetime], @UserIdParam [bigint], @RemoteAddressParam [nvarchar](255), @CreationDateParam [datetime], @LastActionDateParam [datetime], @LastPingDateParam [datetime], @LastActionInfoParam [nvarchar](max), @CreationIsCurrent [bit], @LastActionIsCurrent [bit], @LastPingIsCurrent [bit] ) AS BEGIN
if @SessionIdParam is not null and @SessionIdParam <> '' begin delete from ActiveUserSession where TicketUid <> @TicketUidParam and SessionId = @SessionIdParam end if @CreationIsCurrent <> 0 begin set @CreationDateParam = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP end if @LastActionIsCurrent <> 0 begin set @LastActionDateParam = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP end if @LastPingIsCurrent <> 0 begin set @LastPingDateParam = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP end
;with upsertTable as ( select * from ActiveUserSession ) merge upsertTable target using (select @TicketUidParam TicketUid, @SessionIdParam SessionId) source on (target.TicketUid = source.TicketUid) when matched then update set target.TicketUid = @TicketUidParam, target.Status = @StatusParam, target.Expiration = @ExpirationParam, target.SessionId = @SessionIdParam, target.UserId = @UserIdParam, target.RemoteAddress = @RemoteAddressParam, target.CreationDate = @CreationDateParam, target.LastActionDate = @LastActionDateParam, target.LastPingDate = @LastPingDateParam, target.LastActionInfo = @LastActionInfoParam when not matched then insert (TicketUid, Status, Expiration, SessionId, UserId, RemoteAddress, CreationDate, LastActionDate, LastPingDate, LastActionInfo) values (@TicketUidParam, @StatusParam, @ExpirationParam, @SessionIdParam, @UserIdParam, @RemoteAddressParam, @CreationDateParam, @LastActionDateParam, @LastPingDateParam, @LastActionInfoParam);
END
